modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access advisee records in Banner Self Service

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to look up my advisees in Banner Self Service, but I can't find any records. Every time I search, I get the same error message. It says I don't have students assigned for the term I selected, and it suggests I try another term or search by student ID. It's really frustrating because I need this info for my advising sessions!
short_description: Unable to access advisee records in Banner Self Service
